repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Department of Food and Nutrition records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Food and Nutrition

did.physdesc: Records, minutes, correspondence, plans of work, publications, reports, photographs.
did.abstract: Records and photographs of faculty and graduate students in the Dept. of Food and Nutrition of the College of Home Economics.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: In 1969 the Department of Food and Nutrition and the Department of Institution Management merged to become the Department of Human Nutrition and Food.

In 1974 the Board of Trustees voted to abolish the Department of Human Nutrition and Food in the College of Human Ecology and the Graduate School of Nutrition to establish the Division of Nutritional Sciences, an intercollege unit within the Colleges of Agriculture and Life Sciences and Human Ecology.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, annual reports, minutes of meetings, plans of work, Purnell and Blackhead-Jones Research material, and subject files concerning World War II. Also photographs (identified) of faculty and graduate students in the Department of Food and Nutrition, taken at Mt. Pleasant Lodge, of the Cornell Outing Club, and a notebook kept by Mary W. Meter.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series IV. Plans of Work Box 1
Series VIII. School of Nutrition Files Box 1

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dept. of Food and Nutrition records, #23-14-2485. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
